name: test_limit_modal_upgrade_plan[chromium]
description:
When the broker is at the bid limit and places another bid,
    clicking 'Upgrade plan' should navigate to the pricing/upgrade page.

    Pre-condition: broker must already be at 20/20.
descriptionHtml:
When the broker is at the bid limit and places another bid,
clicking 'Upgrade plan' should navigate to the pricing/upgrade page.

Pre-condition: broker must already be at 20/20.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for get_by_test_id("sidebar_usage_link").or_(get_by_text("Usage", exact=True)).first
statusTrace:
logged_in_broker = <Page url='https://app.flexobo-mock.site/profile/root'>
logged_in_load_owner = <Page url='about:blank'>

    @allure.feature("Plan Limits")
    @allure.story("'Limit reached' modal: 'Upgrade plan' navigates to upgrade page")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    def test_limit_modal_upgrade_plan(
        logged_in_broker: Page, logged_in_load_owner: Page
    ):
        """
        When the broker is at the bid limit and places another bid,
        clicking 'Upgrade plan' should navigate to the pricing/upgrade page.
    
        Pre-condition: broker must already be at 20/20.
        """
        broker = logged_in_broker
        owner = logged_in_load_owner
        broker.set_default_timeout(60000)
        owner.set_default_timeout(60000)
    
        with allure.step("Check that broker is already at the bid limit"):
>           current = read_usage_counter(broker, "Bids placed", BID_LIMIT)
                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

tests/limits/test_bid_limit_enforcement.py:186: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

page = <Page url='https://app.flexobo-mock.site/profile/root'>
label = 'Bids placed', limit = 20

    def read_usage_counter(page: Page, label: str, limit: int) -> int:
        """Read a usage counter value from the Usage tab in profile."""
        page.goto(f"{APP_URL}/profile/root", wait_until="domcontentloaded")
        usage_link = page.get_by_test_id("sidebar_usage_link").or_(
            page.get_by_text("Usage", exact=True)
        ).first
>       expect(usage_link).to_be_visible()

E         - waiting for get_by_test_id("sidebar_usage_link").or_(get_by_text("Usage", exact=True)).first
